source.code:
queue action flee:
            with:
                @fleer: @accused
            abandon:
                @accused.paranoia < 60
            time:
                between: 0 minutes and 4 minutes from action

queue action suspect-identity:
            with partial:
                @suspector: @reader
                @suspected: @letter.mentions
            urgent: false
            time:
                between: 1 minutes and 4 minutes from action

queue action confront:
            with partial:
                @accuser: @reader
            abandon:
                @reader.paranoia < 40
            time:
                between: 0 minutes and 6 minutes from action
